name: docker-compose-audit
title: Docker Compose Security Audit
description: MCP server that audits docker-compose.yml files for security misconfigurations. Trivy-grade catalog (50+ checks roadmapped, ~12 live in v1), MCP-native interface designed for AI agents — every finding ships with a severity rating, full remediation text, and a YAML fix snippet you can paste. Single umbrella tool (audit_compose) plus per-category tools (check_privilege, check_network, etc.). Built by Unbearable TechTips.

input.title: Actor input schema
input.description: MCP server runs in Standby mode — input is supplied via MCP tool calls, not Actor input.
